name: opendesk-ai
description: OpenDesk AI — Autonomous desktop operator monorepo

scripts.setup: npm install && cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install
scripts.dev:gateway: cd gateway && sh -c 'set -a && [ -f .env ] && . .env && set +a && go run ./cmd/server/'
scripts.dev:all: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --prefix-colors "bgBlue.bold,bgGreen.bold,bgMagenta.bold" --names "BACKEND ,FRONTEND,GATEWAY " "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run dev:gateway"
